candidate.completion: send a push notification pretending someone misses me.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please send a push notification pretending someone misses me.

evaluation.rationale: The line has a recognizable modern truth and a fairly exact image in the fake push notification, but the turn is more confession than clean reversal. Its idea is clear, though the phrasing is relatively long and not quite polished into a quotable snap.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
